subcodes.first_line: The Lamp crieth out amidst the nations, proclaiming: "By God! That which lay hidden in the knowledge of God hath been made manifest." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السراج ینادی بین الامم و یقول تالله قد ظهر ما کان مخزونا فی علم الله و
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @blind imitation [taqlid], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
